query: SELECT email, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL GROUP BY email HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2iEKifVQ9gKtEas.df925e926073 --database LzctYumsgUPHufBWpYPJuY --execute SELECT email, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL GROUP BY email HAVING cnt > 1;
